---
title: "Henrietta Newman Woodgate"
---

## Henrietta Newman Woodgate

**Dates:** (1839-1924)

### Description

of Crowthorne, Wokingham

### Biography

Eldest of the ten children of the Rev, Henry Arthur Woodgate, Rector of Bellbroughton, Worcs., she was living in Crowthorne with three unmarried younger sisters at the time of the 1891 census.  She was a friend and correspondent of  [[person:1084]John Henry Newman] (was she perhaps his goddaughter?).

### Letters

- Letter from May 9th 1891

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
